Notes: First Centennial Conference win over Washington College for Bryn Mawr.
First Centennial Conference win for Bryn Mawr since 2001-02 win over Haverford
Senior guard Deb Charamella cements Bryn Mawr career assist record at 348.
Game.Officials: Mike Woodrow,  Michele Kan,  Mark McClanahan
